description_long: This is a large, two-story residential house surrounded by several mature trees and featuring a prominent front entrance with steps leading up to a covered porch. The house has a classic rectangular footprint with an attached side wing and a gabled roof. Numerous windows are symmetrically arranged across the facade, with shutters accentuating the traditional architectural style. The property includes a driveway leading to a garage at the rear, and a fenced backyard area with a patio or deck. The exterior appears to be finished in light-colored siding, with blue accents on the window shutters and doors. The landscaping is well-maintained, with trees evenly spaced around the perimeter, enhancing the suburban character.
description: A spacious, two-story traditional house with a gabled roof, symmetrical windows, a covered front porch, and surrounding trees. Features include a driveway, garage, and a fenced backyard patio.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance with steps, covered porch, symmetrical windows, and several trees in the front yard.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the gabled roof, side wing, and backyard patio area with visible outdoor furniture and trees.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the garage, fenced backyard, and additional windows along the back and side of the house.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the driveway leading to the garage, the side of the house, and more trees lining the property.
attribute_entryway_design: Central front door with steps, covered porch, and decorative columns
